info.title: Rixl Cloud API
info.description: Customer-facing API for the Rixl platform, served by the edge gateway. The gateway is a grpc-gateway based HTTP/JSON layer that proxies requests to Rixl's backend gRPC services (api and auth-api), exposing a single unified REST surface generated directly from the service protos. It validates credentials at the edge — bearer tokens (Authorization) and API keys (X-API-Key) — forwards them to the backend services, and returns consistent JSON error responses.

authentication.title: authentication
authentication.description:
authentication lists the 2FA methods the user has configured when
 status is "2fa_required". The public API renders these as lowercase
 strings: "passkey", "totp".

passkey_options.title: passkey_options
passkey_options.description:
passkey_options is the WebAuthn PublicKeyCredentialRequestOptions as JSON,
 present only when "passkey" is one of the authentication methods.

auth.v1.PasskeyLoginBeginRequest.title: PasskeyLoginBeginRequest
auth.v1.PasskeyLoginBeginRequest.description:
options and credential carry the WebAuthn ceremony payloads verbatim as JSON
 (the browser credential API consumes them as-is), so they are opaque bytes.
